key_findings: 43 CRITICAL advisories requiring immediate SOC attention
0 CISA KEV confirmed — exploited in the wild
Active threat actors: CDB-RAN-02, CDB-FIN-09, CDB-FIN-11
hunt_priorities: Reconnaissance-to-Exploitation: scan artifacts preceding exploit attempts
Credential theft followed by C2 beacon — LSASS + unusual outbound
Ransomware kill-chain: VSS deletion + mass encryption pattern
recommended_actions: Deploy all CRITICAL Sigma/YARA rules to SIEM immediately
Patch CISA KEV items within 24-hour emergency window
Hunt for T1078 (valid account) and T1547 (persistence) artifacts
Enable enhanced logging for PowerShell, WMI, and scheduled tasks
Review privileged account activity for anomalous lateral movement
